name: io.github.cuttalo/depscope
description: Package Intelligence for AI agents — 22 tools across 19 ecosystems (npm, pypi, cargo, go, maven, nuget, rubygems, composer, pub, hex, swift, cocoapods, cpan, hackage, cran, conda, homebrew). Check health, vulnerabilities (OSV + CISA KEV + EPSS), typosquats, malicious flags, alternatives, known bugs, breaking changes, stack compatibility and error-to-fix. 749k+ packages, 17,290 CVEs. Zero auth, MIT.
